connections.def: from 1671; a Hellen (Grecian) or inhabitant of Hellas; by extension a Greek-speaking person, especially a non-Jew:-- Gentile, Greek. see GREEK for
adverb from the same as 1675; Hellenistically, i.e. in the Grecian language:--Greek. see GREEK for
from 1672; Hellenic, i.e. Grecian (in language):--Greek. see GREEK for
